title: auto-name mirror columns
excerpt: It would be ideal to auto-name a mirror column the same name as the column being mirrored.

posts.author: HAMondayAdmin (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be ideal to auto-name a mirror column the same name as the column being mirrored.

posts.author: hseron (Henry)
posts.cookedHtml: This is such of a basic feature. They focus a lot on adding so complex stuff and forget about the basics!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
@hseron Funny enough, the mirroring function used to be better. When adding a Connect Board column, it would prompt you to add mirror columns - it would then give you a check list of all the columns on the board from which to select the columns you want to mirror, all at once. As a cherry on top, it would name them the same as the source board.

This all went away when the introduced the ability to connect multiple boards into a single column (understandably)

Good ol’ days.
